(*********************************************************************************

 Colimits of categories

 Contents:
 1. Initial object
 2. Coproducts
 3. Extensivity
 4. Kleisli objects

 *********************************************************************************)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.StandardCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.EilenbergMoore.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.KleisliCategory.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KleisliCategory.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Reindexing.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Subcategory.Full.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.MonadsLax.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Examples.MorphismsInBicatOfUnivCats.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.Examples.MonadsInOp1Bicat.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. Initial object
 *)

is_biinitial empty_category


is_biinitial empty_category

  
biinitial_1cell_property empty_category
∏ Y : bicat_of_univ_cats,
biinitial_2cell_property empty_category Y
∏ Y : bicat_of_univ_cats,
biinitial_eq_property empty_category Y

  
biinitial_1cell_property empty_category
 exact (λ C, functor_from_empty (pr1 C)).
  
∏ Y : bicat_of_univ_cats,
biinitial_2cell_property empty_category Y
 exact (λ _ F G, nat_trans_from_empty F G).
  
∏ Y : bicat_of_univ_cats,
biinitial_eq_property empty_category Y
 abstract
      (intros Y f g α β ;
       use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
       exact (λ z, fromempty z)).
Defined.

Definition biinitial_obj_bicat_of_univ_cats
  : biinitial_obj bicat_of_univ_cats
  := empty_category ,, empty_category_is_biinitial.


is_strict_biinitial_obj empty_category


is_strict_biinitial_obj empty_category

  
biinitial_is_strict_biinitial_obj
  empty_category_is_biinitial

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
left_adjoint_equivalence F

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
left_equivalence F

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ empty_category, C ⟧
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
id₁ C ==> F · ?pr1
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
(λ _ : id₁ C ==> F · ?pr1,
 ?pr1 · F ==> id₁ empty_category) ?pr10
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ empty_category, C ⟧
 exact (functor_from_empty _).
  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
id₁ C ==> F · functor_from_empty C
 apply nat_trans_to_empty.
  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
(λ _ : id₁ C ==> F · functor_from_empty C,
 functor_from_empty C · F ==> id₁ empty_category)
  (nat_trans_to_empty F (functor_from_empty C) (id₁ C))
 exact (nat_trans_from_empty _ _).
  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (functor_from_empty C,,
      nat_trans_to_empty F (functor_from_empty C)
        (id₁ C),,
      nat_trans_from_empty (functor_from_empty C · F)
        (id₁ empty_category)))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (left_adjoint_unit
        (functor_from_empty C,,
         nat_trans_to_empty F (functor_from_empty C)
           (id₁ C),,
         nat_trans_from_empty
           (functor_from_empty C · F)
           (id₁ empty_category))))

    apply nat_trans_to_empty_is_nat_z_iso.
  
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (functor_from_empty C,,
             nat_trans_to_empty F
               (functor_from_empty C) (id₁ C),,
             nat_trans_from_empty
               (functor_from_empty C · F)
               (id₁ empty_category))),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (functor_from_empty C,,
       nat_trans_to_empty F (functor_from_empty C)
         (id₁ C),,
       nat_trans_from_empty (functor_from_empty C · F)
         (id₁ empty_category))))
  (is_nat_z_iso_to_is_invertible_2cell
     (left_adjoint_unit
        (functor_from_empty C,,
         nat_trans_to_empty F (functor_from_empty C)
           (id₁ C),,
         nat_trans_from_empty
           (functor_from_empty C · F)
           (id₁ empty_category)))
     (nat_trans_to_empty_is_nat_z_iso F
        (functor_from_empty C) (id₁ C)))
 
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (left_adjoint_counit
        (functor_from_empty C,,
         nat_trans_to_empty F (functor_from_empty C)
           (id₁ C),,
         nat_trans_from_empty
           (functor_from_empty C · F)
           (id₁ empty_category))))

    
C: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, empty_category ⟧
z: empty_category
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (left_adjoint_counit
        (functor_from_empty C,,
         nat_trans_to_empty F (functor_from_empty C)
           (id₁ C),,
         nat_trans_from_empty
           (functor_from_empty C · F)
           (id₁ empty_category))) z)

    apply (fromempty z).
Defined.

(**
 2. Coproducts
 *)

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂


C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bicat_of_univ_cats
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, ?p ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₂, ?p ⟧

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bicat_of_univ_cats
 exact (bincoprod_of_univalent_category C₁ C₂).
  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁,
bincoprod_of_univalent_category C₁ C₂ ⟧
 exact (inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂)).
  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₂,
bincoprod_of_univalent_category C₁ C₂ ⟧
 exact (inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂)).
Defined.

Section BincoprodUMP.
  Context (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats).

bincoprod_ump_1
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)

bincoprod_ump_1
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
bincoprod_1cell
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) Q

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂, Q ⟧
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) · 
   ?φ) (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr
     (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) · 
   ?φ) (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂, Q ⟧
 exact (sum_of_functors
               (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
               (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q)).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
   · sum_of_functors (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
       (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q))
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
nat_z_iso
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
   · sum_of_functors (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
       (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q))
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)

      exact (sum_of_functor_inl_nat_z_iso
               (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
               (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q)).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr
     (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
   · sum_of_functors (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
       (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q))
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
Q: bincoprod_cocone C₁ C₂
nat_z_iso
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr
     (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
   · sum_of_functors (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
       (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q))
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q)

      exact (sum_of_functor_inr_nat_z_iso
               (bincoprod_cocone_inl Q)
               (bincoprod_cocone_inr Q)).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂, Q: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂, Q ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) · F ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) · G
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) · F ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) · G
isaprop
  (∑ γ : F ==> G,
   bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) ◃ γ =
   α
   × bincoprod_cocone_inr
       (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) ◃ γ =
     β)

bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) · G
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γ : F ==> G,
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) ◃ γ =
α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr
    (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
  ◃ γ = β
φ₁ = φ₂

bincoprod_cocone_inl

α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr

α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr

  ◃ γ = β
∏ x : bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂,
pr1 φ₁ x = pr1 φ₂ x

pr1 φ₁ (inl x) = pr1 φ₂ (inl x)

x: C₁
pr1 φ₁ (inl x) = pr1 φ₂ (inl x)
 exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 φ₁) x @ !(nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr12 φ₂) x)).

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ γ : F ==> G,
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂) ◃ γ =
α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr
    (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
  ◃ γ = β
y: C₂
pr1 φ₁ (inr y) = pr1 φ₂ (inr y)
 exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 φ₁) y @ !(nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 φ₂) y)).
  Qed.

F ==> G
 exact (sum_of_nat_trans α β).

bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
◃ sum_of_nat_trans α β = α
 exact (sum_of_nat_trans_inl α β).

(λ _ : bincoprod_cocone_inl
         (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
       ◃ sum_of_nat_trans α β = α,
 bincoprod_cocone_inr
   (bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂)
 ◃ sum_of_nat_trans α β = β)
  (sum_of_nat_trans_inl α β)
 exact (sum_of_nat_trans_inr α β).
  Defined.

End BincoprodUMP.

Definition bincoprod_bicat_of_univ_cats
  : has_bincoprod bicat_of_univ_cats
  := λ C₁ C₂,
     bincoprod_cocone_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂
     ,,
     has_bincoprod_ump_bicat_of_univ_cats C₁ C₂.

Definition bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod
  : bicat_with_biinitial_bincoprod
  := bicat_of_univ_cats ,, biinitial_obj_bicat_of_univ_cats ,, bincoprod_bicat_of_univ_cats.

(**
 3. Extensivity
 *)
Section DisjointCoproducts.
  Context (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod).

  Notation "∁" := bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod.

  Let R := @biinitial_comma_cone
             ∁
             C₁ C₂
             (pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂))
             (inl_functor _ _)
             (inr_functor _ _).

  Section OneCell.
    Context (Q : @comma_cone
                   ∁
                   C₁ C₂
                   (pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂))
                   (inl_functor _ _)
                   (inr_functor _ _)).

    
C₁, C₂: ∁
R:= biinitial_comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂)
  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
functor_data (pr11 Q) (pr11 R)

    
C₁, C₂: ∁
R:= biinitial_comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂)
  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
functor_data (pr11 Q) (pr11 R)

      
C₁, C₂: ∁
R:= biinitial_comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂)
  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
pr11 Q → pr11 R
C₁, C₂: ∁
R:= biinitial_comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂)
  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
∏ a b : pr11 Q,
pr11 Q ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr11 R ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
C₁, C₂: ∁
R:= biinitial_comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂)
  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
pr11 Q → pr11 R
 exact (λ q, pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q).
      
C₁, C₂: ∁
R:= biinitial_comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂)
  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
∏ a b : pr11 Q,
pr11 Q ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ pr11 R
  ⟦ (λ q : pr11 Q, pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q) a,
  (λ q : pr11 Q, pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q) b ⟧
 exact (λ q _ _, fromempty (pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q)).
    Defined.

Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
is_functor
  bicat_of_univ_cats_inl_inr_1cell_functor_data

Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
q: pr11 Q
# bicat_of_univ_cats_inl_inr_1cell_functor_data
  (id₁ q) =
id₁ (bicat_of_univ_cats_inl_inr_1cell_functor_data q)

        exact (fromempty (pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q)).

  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)

Q: comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
q, b, c: pr11 Q
f: pr11 Q ⟦ q, b ⟧
g: pr11 Q ⟦ b, c ⟧
# bicat_of_univ_cats_inl_inr_1cell_functor_data
  (f · g) =
# bicat_of_univ_cats_inl_inr_1cell_functor_data f
· # bicat_of_univ_cats_inl_inr_1cell_functor_data g

        exact (fromempty (pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q)).

is_functor ?F

      
C₁, C₂: ∁

  (inr_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inl_functor C₁ C₂) (inr_functor C₁ C₂)

 abstract

Q: ∁

          (use invproofirrelevance ;
           intros τ₁ τ₂ ;

           use nat_trans_eq ;
           [ apply homset_property | ] ;
           intros q ;
           exact (fromempty (pr1 φ q))).

∏ a b : pr11 Q,
pr11 Q ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ pr11 R'
  ⟦ (λ q : pr11 Q, pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q) a,
  (λ q : pr11 Q, pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q) b ⟧
 exact (λ q _ _, fromempty (pr1 (comma_cone_cell Q) q)).
    Defined.

α: φ · comma_cone_pr1 R' ==> ψ · comma_cone_pr1 R'
β: φ · comma_cone_pr2 R' ==> ψ · comma_cone_pr2 R'

     (inr_functor C₁ C₂))
• (ψ ◃ comma_cone_cell R')
∃! γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ comma_cone_pr1 R' = α × γ ▹ comma_cone_pr2 R' = β

  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   γ ▹ comma_cone_pr1 R' = α
   × γ ▹ comma_cone_pr2 R' = β)
 abstract
          (use invproofirrelevance ;
           intros τ₁ τ₂ ;
           use subtypePath ;
           [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property | ] ;
           use nat_trans_eq ;
           [ apply homset_property | ] ;
           intros q ;
           exact (fromempty (pr1 φ q))).

  (inl_functor C₁ C₂): comma_cone (inr_functor C₁ C₂)
  (inl_functor C₁ C₂)

 make_nat_trans φ ψ

 ▹ comma_cone_pr2 R' = β)

 abstract
            (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
             intros q ;
             exact (fromempty (pr1 φ q))).
  Defined.
End DisjointCoproducts.

Section UniversalCoproducts.
  Notation "∁" := bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod.

  Context {C₁ C₂ Z : ∁}
          (F : Z --> pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)).

  Let ι₁ : C₁ --> pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
    := inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂).
  Let ι₂ : C₂ --> pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
    := inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂).

  Let κ₁ : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F , Z ⟧
    := iso_comma_pr2 _ _.
  Let κ₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F , Z ⟧
    := iso_comma_pr2 _ _.

  Section UniversalCoproductsOne.
    Context (W : @bincoprod_cocone
                   bicat_of_univ_cats
                   (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
                   (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)).

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
pr11 W

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
pr11 W

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
pr11 W
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
pr11 W

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
pr11 W
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F

        exact ((x ,, z) ,, i).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
pr11 W
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F

        exact ((y ,, z) ,, i).
    Defined.

    Notation "'H₀'" := pb_of_sum_cats_ob.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W ⟦ H₀ i₁, H₀ i₂ ⟧

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W ⟦ H₀ i₁, H₀ i₂ ⟧

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C₁
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
x₁: C₁
y₂: C₂
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inr y₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
y₁: C₂
x₂: C₁
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inl x₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z

g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C₁
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ (x₁,, z₁),, i₁,
(x₂,, z₂),, i₂ ⟧

        exact ((g ,, f) ,, p).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
x₁: C₁
y₂: C₂
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inr y₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧
 exact (fromempty g).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
y₁: C₂
x₂: C₁
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inl x₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧
 exact (fromempty g).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₁,, z₁),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₂,, z₂),, i₂) ⟧
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ (y₁,, z₁),, i₁,
(y₂,, z₂),, i₂ ⟧

        exact ((g ,, f) ,, p).
    Defined.

    Local Notation "'H₁'" := pb_of_sum_cats_mor.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g₁, g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
p: g₁ = g₂
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
r₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
H₁ f g₁ i₁ i₂ r₁ = H₁ f g₂ i₁ i₂ r₂

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g₁, g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
p: g₁ = g₂
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
r₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
H₁ f g₁ i₁ i₂ r₁ = H₁ f g₂ i₁ i₂ r₂

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
r₁, r₂: g₁ · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
H₁ f g₁ i₁ i₂ r₁ = H₁ f g₁ i₁ i₂ r₂

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
r₁, r₂: g₁ · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₁ = r₂

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
functor_data (pr1 Z) (pr11 W)

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
functor_data (pr1 Z) (pr11 W)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
pr1 Z → pr11 W
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
∏ a b : pr1 Z, pr1 Z ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr11 W ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
pr1 Z → pr11 W
 exact (λ z, H₀ (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
∏ a b : pr1 Z,
pr1 Z ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ pr11 W
  ⟦ (λ z : pr1 Z, H₀ (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))) a,
  (λ z : pr1 Z, H₀ (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))) b ⟧
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
# (pr1 F) f · identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₂) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁) · # (pr1 F) f

        abstract
          (rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ q · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
H₁ (id₁ z) (id₁ q) i i p = id₁ (H₀ i)

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ q · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
H₁ (id₁ z) (id₁ q) i i p = id₁ (H₀ i)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inl x) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((id₁ x,, id₁ z),, p) =
id₁ ((pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x,, z),, i))
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inr y) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((id₁ y,, id₁ z),, p) =
id₁ ((pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y,, z),, i))

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inl x) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((id₁ x,, id₁ z),, p) =
id₁ ((pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x,, z),, i))

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inl x) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((id₁ x,, id₁ z),, p) =
# (bincoprod_cocone_inl W) (id₁ ((x,, z),, i))

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inl x) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
(id₁ x,, id₁ z),, p =
make_dirprod (id₁ x) (id₁ z),, id_disp i

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inl x) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
p = id_disp i

        apply (homset_property
                 (pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂))
                 (inl x)
                 (pr1 F z)).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inr y) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((id₁ y,, id₁ z),, p) =
id₁ ((pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y,, z),, i))
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inr y) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((id₁ y,, id₁ z),, p) =
# (bincoprod_cocone_inr W) (id₁ ((y,, z),, i))

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inr y) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
(id₁ y,, id₁ z),, p =
make_dirprod (id₁ y) (id₁ z),, id_disp i

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
p: id₁ (inr y) · i = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
p = id_disp i

        apply (homset_property
                 (pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂))
                 (inr y)
                 (pr1 F z)).
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
q₁, q₂, q₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₂, q₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso q₃ (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
H₁ (f · g) (ff · gg) i₁ i₃ p₁ =
H₁ f ff i₁ i₂ p₂ · H₁ g gg i₂ i₃ p₃

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
q₁, q₂, q₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₂, q₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso q₃ (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
H₁ (f · g) (ff · gg) i₁ i₃ p₁ =
H₁ f ff i₁ i₂ p₂ · H₁ g gg i₂ i₃ p₃

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((ff · gg,, f · g),, p₁) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((ff,, f),, p₂)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((gg,, g),, p₃)
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inr y₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
fromempty (fromempty gg) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((ff,, f),, p₂)
· fromempty gg
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁: C₁
y₂: C₂
x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((fromempty gg,, f · g),, p₁) =
fromempty ff · fromempty gg
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁: C₁
y₂, y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inr y₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
fromempty (fromempty ff) =
fromempty ff
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((gg,, g),, p₃)
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
y₁: C₂
x₂, x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
fromempty (fromempty ff) =
fromempty ff
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((gg,, g),, p₃)
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
y₁: C₂
x₂: C₁
y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inr y₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
  ((fromempty ff,, f · g),, p₁) =
fromempty ff · fromempty gg
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
fromempty (fromempty gg) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((ff,, f),, p₂)
· fromempty gg
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inr y₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
  ((ff · gg,, f · g),, p₁) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((ff,, f),, p₂)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((gg,, g),, p₃)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((ff · gg,, f · g),, p₁) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((ff,, f),, p₂)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((gg,, g),, p₃)
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((ff · gg,, f · g),, p₁) =
# (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)
  (((ff,, f),, p₂) · ((gg,, g),, p₃))

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
(ff · gg,, f · g),, p₁ =
make_dirprod (ff · gg) (f · g),, (p₂ ;; p₃)%mor_disp

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
p₁ = (p₂ ;; p₃)%mor_disp

        apply (homset_property (pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)) (inl x₁)).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inr y₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
fromempty (fromempty gg) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((ff,, f),, p₂)
· fromempty gg
 apply (fromempty gg).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
x₁: C₁
y₂: C₂
x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((fromempty gg,, f · g),, p₁) =
fromempty ff · fromempty gg
 apply (fromempty gg).

gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inr y₃ ⟧

i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)

p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
fromempty (fromempty ff) =
fromempty ff
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((gg,, g),, p₃)
 apply (fromempty ff).

i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)

g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
y₁: C₂
x₂: C₁
y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inl x₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₂, inr y₃ ⟧

i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)

p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
  ((fromempty ff,, f · g),, p₁) =
fromempty ff · fromempty gg
 apply (fromempty gg).

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧

x₃: C₁
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inl x₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inl x₃) (pr1 F z₃)

p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
fromempty (fromempty gg) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((ff,, f),, p₂)
· fromempty gg
 apply (fromempty gg).

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧

ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inr y₃ ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)

p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g

· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((gg,, g),, p₃)

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inr y₃ ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)

p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g

  ((ff · gg,, f · g),, p₁) =
# (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)
  (((ff,, f),, p₂) · ((gg,, g),, p₃))

g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧

i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)

p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g

make_dirprod (ff · gg) (f · g),, (p₂ ;; p₃)%mor_disp

f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
ff: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
gg: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₂, inr y₃ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
i₃: z_iso (inr y₃) (pr1 F z₃)
p₁: ff · gg · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
p₂: ff · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
p₃: gg · i₃ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) g
p₁ = (p₂ ;; p₃)%mor_disp

        apply (homset_property (pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)) (inr y₁)).
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_functor pb_of_sum_cats_data

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_functor pb_of_sum_cats_data

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
functor_idax pb_of_sum_cats_data
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
H₁ (id₁ z) (# (pr1 F) (id₁ z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z z (id₁ z)) =
id₁ (H₀ (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)))

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
H₁ (id₁ z) (# (pr1 F) (id₁ z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z z (id₁ z)) =
H₁ (id₁ z) (id₁ (pr1 F z)) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)) ?p
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
id₁ (pr1 F z) · identity_z_iso (pr1 F z) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F z) · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
H₁ (id₁ z) (# (pr1 F) (id₁ z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z z (id₁ z)) =
H₁ (id₁ z) (id₁ (pr1 F z)) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)) ?p
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
# (pr1 F) (id₁ z) = id₁ (pr1 F z)

          apply functor_id.
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
id₁ (pr1 F z) · identity_z_iso (pr1 F z) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F z) · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)
 exact (id_left _ @ !(functor_id _ _) @ !(id_left _)).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
functor_compax pb_of_sum_cats_data
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
H₁ (f · g) (# (pr1 F) (f · g))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z₁ z₃ (f · g)) =
H₁ f (# (pr1 F) f) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₂))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z₁ z₂ f)
· H₁ g (# (pr1 F) g) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₂))
    (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃))
    (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z₂ z₃ g)

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
H₁ (f · g) (# (pr1 F) (f · g))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z₁ z₃ (f · g)) =
H₁ (f · g) (# (pr1 F) f · # (pr1 F) g)
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃)) ?p₁
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
# (pr1 F) f · # (pr1 F) g · identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁) · # (pr1 F) (f · g)

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
H₁ (f · g) (# (pr1 F) (f · g))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof z₁ z₃ (f · g)) =
H₁ (f · g) (# (pr1 F) f · # (pr1 F) g)
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃)) ?p₁
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
# (pr1 F) (f · g) = # (pr1 F) f · # (pr1 F) g

          apply functor_comp.
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
# (pr1 F) f · # (pr1 F) g · identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₃) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F z₁) · # (pr1 F) (f · g)
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂, z₃: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: pr1 Z ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
# (pr1 F) (f · g) = # (pr1 F) f · # (pr1 F) g

          apply functor_comp.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
∁ ⟦ Z, W ⟧

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
∁ ⟦ Z, W ⟧

C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
pr11 W ⟦ H₀ i₁, H₀ i₂ ⟧

C₁, C₂, Z: ∁

i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₁,, z),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((x₂,, z),, i₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

x₁, x₂: C₁

i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ (x₁,, z),, i₁,
(x₂,, z),, i₂ ⟧

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₁ Z
       ⟦ pr1 ((x₁,, z),, i₁), pr1 ((x₂,, z),, i₂) ⟧,
 pr2 ((x₁,, z),, i₁) -->[ f] pr2 ((x₂,, z),, i₂))
  (k,, id₁ (pr21 ((x₁,, z),, i₁)))

        abstract
          (simpl ;
           refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, i₁ · z) (!(functor_id F z))) ;
           refine (_ @ !(id_right _)) ;
           exact p).

p: k · i₂ = i₁
∅

        exact (pr1 i₁ · inv_from_z_iso i₂).

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
pr11 W ⟦ H₀ i₁, H₀ i₂ ⟧
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
pr11 W
⟦ (pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₁,, z),, i₁),
(pr11 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ((y₂,, z),, i₂) ⟧

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ (y₁,, z),, i₁,
(y₂,, z),, i₂ ⟧

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr y₁, inr y₂ ⟧
p: k · i₂ = i₁
(λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct C₂ Z
       ⟦ pr1 ((y₁,, z),, i₁), pr1 ((y₂,, z),, i₂) ⟧,
 pr2 ((y₁,, z),, i₁) -->[ f] pr2 ((y₂,, z),, i₂))
  (k,, id₁ (pr21 ((y₁,, z),, i₁)))

        abstract
          (simpl ;
           refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, i₁ · z) (!(functor_id F z))) ;
           refine (_ @ !(id_right _)) ;
           exact p).
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso q₁ q₂
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (pb_of_cats_iso_mor z q₁ q₂ i₁ i₂ k p)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (pb_of_cats_iso_mor z (inl x₁) (inl x₂) i₁ i₂ k p)

p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁

⟧

i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism
  ((k,, id₁ (pr21 ((x₁,, z),, i₁))),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z x₁ x₂ i₁ i₂ k p)

k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism

p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁

p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
k · ?pr1 = id₁ x₁
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
?pr1 · k = id₁ x₂

          
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso k).
          
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
k · inv_from_z_iso k = id₁ x₁
 apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso k).
          
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
inv_from_z_iso k · k = id₁ x₂
 apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv k).
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr21 ((k,, id₁ (pr21 ((x₁,, z),, i₁))),,
         pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z x₁ x₂ i₁ i₂ k p))
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
x₁, x₂: C₁
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inl x₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism (id₁ z)

          apply identity_is_z_iso.

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

x₁: C₁
y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (pb_of_cats_iso_mor z (inl x₁) (inr y₂) i₁ i₂ k p)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inl x₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
∅

        exact (pr1 i₁ · inv_from_z_iso i₂).

k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁

k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)

y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
k · ?pr1 = id₁ y₁

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso k).
          
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
k · inv_from_z_iso k = id₁ y₁
 apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso k).

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
inv_from_z_iso k · k = id₁ y₂
 apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv k).
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr21 ((k,, id₁ (pr21 ((y₁,, z),, i₁))),,
         pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z y₁ y₂ i₁ i₂ k
           p))
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

y₁, y₂: C₂
i₁: z_iso (inr y₁) (pr1 F z)
i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z)
k: z_iso (inr y₁) (inr y₂)
p: pr1 k · i₂ = i₁
is_z_isomorphism (id₁ z)

          apply identity_is_z_iso.
    Defined.

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)

z_iso (H₀ (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))) (H₀ i)

q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)

?k · i = identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i = identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
