⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
inv_from_z_iso i · i = id₁ (pr1 F z)

          exact (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
is_z_isomorphism
  (pb_of_cats_iso_mor z (pr1 F z) q
     (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)) i
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i
      :
      z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i =
      identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)))
 apply pb_of_cats_is_z_iso.
    Defined.

    Local Definition pb_of_sum_cats_inl_data
      : nat_trans_data
          (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
          (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
      := λ z, pb_of_sum_cats_z_iso (pr21 z) _ (pr2 z).

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂, q₃, q₄: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₂, q₃ ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₃, q₄ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso q₃ (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso q₄ (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
H₁ f (g₁ · g₂) i₁ i₃ r₁
· pb_of_cats_iso_mor z₂ q₃ q₄ i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂ =
pb_of_cats_iso_mor z₁ q₁ q₂ i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁
· H₁ f (g₂ · g₃) i₂ i₄ r₂

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂, q₃, q₄: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₂, q₃ ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₃, q₄ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso q₃ (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso q₄ (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
H₁ f (g₁ · g₂) i₁ i₃ r₁
· pb_of_cats_iso_mor z₂ q₃ q₄ i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂ =
pb_of_cats_iso_mor z₁ q₁ q₂ i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁
· H₁ f (g₂ · g₃) i₂ i₄ r₂

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
a, o, o0, o1: C₁
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl a, inl o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o, inl o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inl o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl a) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
     pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
a, o, o0: C₁
o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl a, inl o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o, inl o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inr o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl a) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
· fromempty
    (coprod_rect
       (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,
        match z₂ with
        | inl o => C₁ ⟦ o0, o ⟧
        | inr _ => ∅
        end
        → coprod_rect (λ _ : C₁ ⨿ C₂, UU)
            (λ _ : C₁, ∅) (λ y₁ : C₂, C₂ ⟦ y₁, o1 ⟧)
            z₂ → ∅)
       (λ (x₂ : C₁) (_ : C₁ ⟦ o0, x₂ ⟧) (g : ∅),
        fromempty g)
       (λ (y₂ : C₂) (f : ∅) (_ : C₂ ⟦ y₂, o1 ⟧),
        fromempty f) (pr1 F z₂) (pr1 i₃)
       (inv_from_z_iso i₄)) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· fromempty (fromempty g₃)

f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
a, o: C₁
o0: C₂
o1: C₁

g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inl o1 ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)

p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
fromempty (fromempty g₂)
· fromempty
    (coprod_rect
       (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,
        match z₂ with
        | inl _ => ∅
        | inr o => C₂ ⟦ o0, o ⟧
        end
        → coprod_rect (λ _ : C₁ ⨿ C₂, UU)

        fromempty f)

        fromempty g) (pr1 F z₂) (pr1 i₃)
       (inv_from_z_iso i₄)) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((fromempty g₃,, f),, r₂)

o: C₂
o0, o1: C₁

g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inl o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inl o1 ⟧

i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)

r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f

  ((fromempty g₂,, f),, r₁)

    ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
     pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =

  (coprod_rect
     (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,
      match z₂ with
      | inl o => C₁ ⟦ a, o ⟧
      | inr _ => ∅

      → coprod_rect (λ _ : C₁ ⨿ C₂, UU) (λ _ : C₁, ∅)

     (λ (x₂ : C₁) (_ : C₁ ⟦ a, x₂ ⟧) (g : ∅),
      fromempty g)

      fromempty f) (pr1 F z₁) (pr1 i₁)
     (inv_from_z_iso i₂)) · fromempty (fromempty g₂)

· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
    ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b: C₂
o, o0, o1: C₁
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inl o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o, inl o0 ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)

p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃

r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f

· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
     pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =
fromempty
  (coprod_rect
     (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,
      match z₂ with
      | inl _ => ∅

      fromempty f)

      fromempty g) (pr1 F z₁) (pr1 i₁)
     (inv_from_z_iso i₂))

    ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
    ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
     pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
  ((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₁ b o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
    ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧

g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inl o1 ⟧

i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)

p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃

r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
     pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃

r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
# (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)
  (((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
   · ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
      pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂)) =
# (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)
  (((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,

   · ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂))

g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inl o1 ⟧

p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃

r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)

   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =
((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
 pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
a, o, o0, o1: C₁
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl a, inl o ⟧

g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inl o1 ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
pr1
  (((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
   · ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
      pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂)) =
pr1
  (((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
    pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
   · ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂))

i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)

i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
make_dirprod (g₁ · g₂ · g₃) (f · id₁ z₂) =
make_dirprod (g₁ · (g₂ · g₃)) (id₁ z₁ · f)

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
f = f

          apply idpath.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
a, o, o0: C₁
o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl a, inl o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o, inl o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inr o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl a) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
· fromempty
    (coprod_rect
       (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,
        match z₂ with
        | inl o => C₁ ⟦ o0, o ⟧
        | inr _ => ∅
        end
        → coprod_rect (λ _ : C₁ ⨿ C₂, UU)
            (λ _ : C₁, ∅) (λ y₁ : C₂, C₂ ⟦ y₁, o1 ⟧)
            z₂ → ∅)
       (λ (x₂ : C₁) (_ : C₁ ⟦ o0, x₂ ⟧) (g : ∅),
        fromempty g)
       (λ (y₂ : C₂) (f : ∅) (_ : C₂ ⟦ y₂, o1 ⟧),
        fromempty f) (pr1 F z₂) (pr1 i₃)
       (inv_from_z_iso i₄)) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· fromempty (fromempty g₃)
 exact (fromempty g₃).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
a, o: C₁
o0: C₂
o1: C₁
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl a, inl o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inl o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl a) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
fromempty (fromempty g₂)
· fromempty
    (coprod_rect
       (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,
        match z₂ with
        | inl _ => ∅
        | inr o => C₂ ⟦ o0, o ⟧
        end
        → coprod_rect (λ _ : C₁ ⨿ C₂, UU)
            (λ x₁ : C₁, C₁ ⟦ x₁, o1 ⟧) (λ _ : C₂, ∅)
            z₂ → ∅)
       (λ (x₂ : C₁) (f : ∅) (_ : C₁ ⟦ x₂, o1 ⟧),
        fromempty f)
       (λ (y₂ : C₂) (_ : C₂ ⟦ o0, y₂ ⟧) (g : ∅),
        fromempty g) (pr1 F z₂) (pr1 i₃)
       (inv_from_z_iso i₄)) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₁ a o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((fromempty g₃,, f),, r₂)
 exact (fromempty g₂).

· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))

· fromempty (fromempty g₂)

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
a: C₁
o: C₂
o0, o1: C₁
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl a, inr o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inl o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inl o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl a) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  ((fromempty g₂,, f),, r₁)
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
    ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
     pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =
fromempty
  (coprod_rect
     (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,
      match z₂ with
      | inl o => C₁ ⟦ a, o ⟧
      | inr _ => ∅

      → coprod_rect (λ _ : C₁ ⨿ C₂, UU) (λ _ : C₁, ∅)
          (λ y₁ : C₂, C₂ ⟦ y₁, o ⟧) z₂ → ∅)
     (λ (x₂ : C₁) (_ : C₁ ⟦ a, x₂ ⟧) (g : ∅),
      fromempty g)
     (λ (y₂ : C₂) (f : ∅) (_ : C₂ ⟦ y₂, o ⟧),
      fromempty f) (pr1 F z₁) (pr1 i₁)
     (inv_from_z_iso i₂)) · fromempty (fromempty g₂)
 exact (fromempty g₂).

  ((fromempty g₂,, f),, r₁)
· fromempty

        fromempty f) (pr1 F z₂) (pr1 i₃)

fromempty
  (coprod_rect
     (λ z₂ : C₁ ⨿ C₂,

      | inr _ => ∅

      → coprod_rect (λ _ : C₁ ⨿ C₂, UU) (λ _ : C₁, ∅)

     (λ (x₂ : C₁) (_ : C₁ ⟦ a, x₂ ⟧) (g : ∅),
      fromempty g)
     (λ (y₂ : C₂) (f : ∅) (_ : C₂ ⟦ y₂, o ⟧),
      fromempty f) (pr1 F z₁) (pr1 i₁)
     (inv_from_z_iso i₂))
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
    ((fromempty g₂,, f),, r₂)
 exact (fromempty g₂).

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b: C₂
o, o0, o1: C₁
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inl o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o, inl o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl o0, inl o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr b) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inl o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inl o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f

    ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,

    ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr b) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
# (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)
  (((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
   · ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
      pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃
        p₂)) =
# (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)
  (((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
    pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₁ b o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
   · ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂))

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b, o, o0, o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inr o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr b) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
· ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
   pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃ p₂) =
((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
 pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₁ b o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
· ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂)

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b, o, o0, o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inr o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr b) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
pr1
  (((g₁ · g₂,, f),, r₁)
   · ((g₃,, id₁ z₂),,
      pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₂ o0 o1 i₃ i₄ g₃
        p₂)) =
pr1
  (((g₁,, id₁ z₁),,
    pb_of_cats_iso_mor_subproof0 z₁ b o i₁ i₂ g₁ p₁)
   · ((g₂ · g₃,, f),, r₂))

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b, o, o0, o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inr o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr b) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
make_dirprod (g₁ · g₂ · g₃) (f · id₁ z₂) =
make_dirprod (g₁ · (g₂ · g₃)) (id₁ z₁ · f)

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b, o, o0, o1: C₂

g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
g₁ · g₂ · g₃ = g₁ · (g₂ · g₃)

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
f · id₁ z₂ = id₁ z₁ · f

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃

b, o, o0, o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inr o ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)

p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
g₁ · g₂ · g₃ = g₁ · g₂ · g₃

          apply idpath.

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b, o, o0, o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inr o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧

i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)

p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃

f · id₁ z₂ = id₁ z₁ · f

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
b, o, o0, o1: C₂
g₁: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr b, inr o ⟧
g₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o, inr o0 ⟧
g₃: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inr o0, inr o1 ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inr b) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inr o) (pr1 F z₁)
i₃: z_iso (inr o0) (pr1 F z₂)
i₄: z_iso (inr o1) (pr1 F z₂)
p₁: g₁ · i₂ = i₁
p₂: g₃ · i₄ = i₃
r₁: g₁ · g₂ · i₃ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
r₂: g₂ · g₃ · i₄ = i₂ · # (pr1 F) f
f = f

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  pb_of_sum_cats_inl_data

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  pb_of_sum_cats_inl_data

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats) f · pb_of_sum_cats_inl_data y =
pb_of_sum_cats_inl_data x
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) f

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f) (# (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
     (pr21 f))
· pb_of_cats_iso_mor (pr21 y) (pr1 F (pr21 y))
    (inl (pr11 y)) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
    (pr2 y) (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y))
    (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr2 y)) =
pb_of_cats_iso_mor (pr21 x) (pr1 F (pr21 x))
  (inl (pr11 x)) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (pr2 x) (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x))
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr2 x))
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) f

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f) (# (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
     (pr21 f)) =
H₁ (pr21 f)
  (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x)
   · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y))) ?r₁
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x) · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
· identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)) · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)
· pr2 y = pr2 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f)
  (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
   · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)) (pr2 x) (pr2 y) ?r₂ =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) f

f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f) (# (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
     (pr21 f)) =
H₁ (pr21 f)
  (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x)
   · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y))) ?r₁

# (pr1 F) (pr21 f) =
inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x) · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f))

f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) (pr21 f) =
id₁ (F (pr21 x)) · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) (pr21 f) = # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)

        apply idpath.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x) · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
· identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)) · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
 abstract
          (rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           rewrite assoc ;
           rewrite z_iso_after_z_iso_inv ;
           apply id_left).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)
· pr2 y = pr2 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
 abstract
          (rewrite !assoc' ;
           rewrite z_iso_after_z_iso_inv ;
           rewrite id_right ;
           apply idpath).

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
   · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
  (pb_of_sum_cats_inl_is_nat_trans_subproof0 x y f) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) f

pr11 f

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: (λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct
         C₁ Z ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧,
 pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y) (pr1 f)
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) =
pr11 f

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F

p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) =
pr11 f

?b

?b = pr11 f

κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) = ?y'

          exact (!p).
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr11 f · pr2 y · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) = pr11 f

⟧

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr11 f · (pr2 y · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)) = pr11 f

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr11 f · id₁ (inl (pr11 y)) = pr11 f

        apply id_right.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
nat_trans_data (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))

⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)) ?t

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
nat_trans_data (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
 exact pb_of_sum_cats_inl_data.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inl W))
  pb_of_sum_cats_inl_data
 exact pb_of_sum_cats_inl_is_nat_trans.
    Defined.

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

  (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ bincoprod_cocone_inl W

is_nat_z_iso ?μ

⟧

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₁ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ bincoprod_cocone_inl W
 exact pb_of_sum_cats_inl_nat_trans.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_z_iso pb_of_sum_cats_inl_nat_trans
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
c: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
is_z_isomorphism (pb_of_sum_cats_inl_nat_trans c)

        apply z_iso_is_z_isomorphism.
    Defined.

    Local Definition pb_of_sum_cats_inr_data
      : nat_trans_data
          (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
          (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
      := λ z, pb_of_sum_cats_z_iso (pr21 z) _ (pr2 z).

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
  pb_of_sum_cats_inr_data

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
  pb_of_sum_cats_inr_data

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats) f · pb_of_sum_cats_inr_data y =
pb_of_sum_cats_inr_data x
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) f

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f) (# (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
     (pr21 f))
· pb_of_cats_iso_mor (pr21 y) (pr1 F (pr21 y))
    (inr (pr11 y)) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
    (pr2 y) (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y))
    (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr2 y)) =
pb_of_cats_iso_mor (pr21 x) (pr1 F (pr21 x))
  (inr (pr11 x)) (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (pr2 x) (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x))
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr2 x))
· # (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) f

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f) (# (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
     (pr21 f)) =
H₁ (pr21 f)
  (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x)
   · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y))) ?r₁
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x) · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
· identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)) · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)
· pr2 y = pr2 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f)
  (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
   · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)) (pr2 x) (pr2 y) ?r₂ =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) f

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f) (# (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)))
  (pb_of_sum_cats_data_subproof (pr21 x) (pr21 y)
     (pr21 f)) =
H₁ (pr21 f)
  (inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x)
   · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y))) ?r₁

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) (pr21 f) =
inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x) · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f))

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) (pr21 f) =
id₁ (F (pr21 x)) · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) (pr21 f) = # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)

        apply idpath.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (pr2 x) · (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f))
· identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 y)) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x)) · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
 abstract
          (rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           rewrite assoc ;
           rewrite z_iso_after_z_iso_inv ;
           apply id_left).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)
· pr2 y = pr2 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
 abstract
          (rewrite !assoc' ;
           rewrite z_iso_after_z_iso_inv ;
           rewrite id_right ;
           apply idpath).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
H₁ (pr21 f)
  (pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f)
   · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)
  (pb_of_sum_cats_inr_is_nat_trans_subproof0 x y f) =
# (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) f

⟧

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) =
pr11 f

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: (λ f : PrecategoryBinProduct.category_binproduct
         C₂ Z ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧,
 pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y) (pr1 f)
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) =
pr11 f

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) =
pr11 f

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) =
?b
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
?b = pr11 f

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr12 x · # (pr1 F) (pr21 f) = ?y'

          exact (!p).
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁

⟧

  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr11 f · pr2 y · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y) = pr11 f

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr11 f · (pr2 y · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 y)) = pr11 f

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
x, y: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
f: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 f: pr11 f · pr2 y = pr2 x · # F (pr21 f)
pr11 f · id₁ (inr (pr11 y)) = pr11 f

        apply id_right.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
nat_trans_data (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)) ?t

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
nat_trans_data (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
 exact pb_of_sum_cats_inr_data.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_trans (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (pr1 (bincoprod_cocone_inr W))
  pb_of_sum_cats_inr_data
 exact pb_of_sum_cats_inr_is_nat_trans.
    Defined.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
nat_z_iso (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
nat_z_iso (κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats)
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr W)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ bincoprod_cocone_inr W
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
κ₂ ∙ pb_of_sum_cats ⟹ bincoprod_cocone_inr W
 exact pb_of_sum_cats_inr_nat_trans.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
is_nat_z_iso pb_of_sum_cats_inr_nat_trans
 
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: bincoprod_cocone (univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F)
  (univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F)
c: univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F
is_z_isomorphism (pb_of_sum_cats_inr_nat_trans c)

        apply z_iso_is_z_isomorphism.
    Defined.
  End UniversalCoproductsOne.

  Section UniversalCoproductsTwo.
    Context {W : ∁}
            {φ ψ : ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧}
            (α : κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ)
            (β : κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ).

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
W ⟦ pr1 φ z, pr1 ψ z ⟧

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
W ⟦ pr1 φ z, pr1 ψ z ⟧

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
W ⟦ pr1 φ z, pr1 ψ z ⟧
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
W ⟦ pr1 φ z, pr1 ψ z ⟧

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
x: C₁
i: z_iso (inl x) (pr1 F z)
W ⟦ pr1 φ z, pr1 ψ z ⟧
 exact (pr1 α ((x ,, z) ,, i)).
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
W ⟦ pr1 φ z, pr1 ψ z ⟧
 exact (pr1 β ((y ,, z) ,, i)).
    Defined.

    Local Definition pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_data
      : nat_trans_data (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ)
      := λ z, pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z (pr1 F z) (identity_z_iso _).

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 φ) f · pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z₂ q₂ i₂ =
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z₁ q₁ i₁ · # (pr1 ψ) f

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ q₁, q₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso q₁ (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso q₂ (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 φ) f · pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z₂ q₂ i₂ =
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z₁ q₁ i₁ · # (pr1 ψ) f

i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 φ) f · pr1 α ((x₂,, z₂),, i₂) =
pr1 α ((x₁,, z₁),, i₁) · # (pr1 ψ) f

p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 φ) f · pr1 α ((x₂,, z₂),, i₂) =

i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z₁, z₂: pr1 Z
f: pr1 Z ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
x₁, x₂: C₁
g: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ inl x₁, inl x₂ ⟧
i₁: z_iso (inl x₁) (pr1 F z₁)
i₂: z_iso (inl x₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 φ) f · pr1 α ((x₂,, z₂),, i₂) =
pr1 α ((x₁,, z₁),, i₁) · # (pr1 ψ) f
 exact (nat_trans_ax
                 α
                 ((x₁ ,, z₁) ,, i₁)
                 ((x₂ ,, z₂) ,, i₂)
                 ((g ,, _) ,, p)).

i₂: z_iso (inr y₂) (pr1 F z₂)
p: g · i₂ = i₁ · # (pr1 F) f
# (pr1 φ) f · pr1 β ((y₂,, z₂),, i₂) =
pr1 α ((x₁,, z₁),, i₁) · # (pr1 ψ) f
 exact (fromempty (i₁ · # (pr1 F) f · inv_from_z_iso i₂)).

# (pr1 φ) f · pr1 β ((y₂,, z₂),, i₂) =
pr1 β ((y₁,, z₁),, i₁) · # (pr1 ψ) f
 exact (nat_trans_ax
                 β

                 ((y₂ ,, z₂) ,, i₂)
                 ((g ,, _) ,, p)).
    Qed.

is_nat_trans (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ)
  pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_data

  pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_data

α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
x, y: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂
f: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 φ) f
· pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob y (pr1 F y)
    (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)) =
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob x (pr1 F x)
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) · # (pr1 ψ) f

f: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F y ⟧

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

x, y: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂
f: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?g · identity_z_iso (pr1 F y) =
identity_z_iso (pr1 F x) · # (pr1 F) f

α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ

f: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟦ pr1 F x, pr1 F y ⟧
 exact (# (pr1 F) f).

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

x, y: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂
f: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) f · identity_z_iso (pr1 F y) =

ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
x, y: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂
f: make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 F) f = # (pr1 F) f

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z (pr1 F z)
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)) =
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z q i

κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
id₁ (pr1 ψ z) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
?t2 = id₁ (pr1 ψ z)

        apply functor_id.
      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z q i · # ψ (id₁ z) =
# φ (id₁ z)
· pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z (pr1 F z)
    (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z))

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
# φ (id₁ z)
· pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z (pr1 F z)
    (identity_z_iso (pr1 F z)) =
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob z q i · # ψ (id₁ z)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
i · identity_z_iso (pr1 F z) = i · # (pr1 F) (id₁ z)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
i · identity_z_iso (pr1 F z) = i · id₁ (F z)

      
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
z: pr1 Z
q: pr111 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂)
i: z_iso q (pr1 F z)
i = i

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
κ₁ ◃ pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans = α

β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
has_homsets W

β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
∏ x : univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F,
(κ₁ ◃ pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans) x = α x

∏ x : univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F,

β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
x: univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F
pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob (pr21 x) (pr1 F (pr21 x))
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F (pr21 x))) = α x

      exact (pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_ob_id _ _ (pr2 x)).
    Qed.

φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
isaprop (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧

isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β)

τ₁ = τ₂

C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: κ₁ · φ ==> κ₁ · ψ
β: κ₂ · φ ==> κ₂ · ψ
τ₁, τ₂: ∑ γ : φ ==> ψ, κ₁ ◃ γ = α × κ₂ ◃ γ = β
z: Z
y: C₂
i: z_iso (inr y) (pr1 F z)
pr1 τ₂ z = β ((y,, z),, i)

        exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pr22 τ₂) ((y ,, z) ,, i)).
    Qed.
  End UniversalCoproductsTwo.

  
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
has_bincoprod_ump (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)

invertible_2cell
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ?φ)
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)

 exact (pb_of_sum_cats W).

   · pb_of_sum_cats W) (bincoprod_cocone_inl W)

W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
∃! γ : φ ==> ψ,
bincoprod_cocone_inl (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
◃ γ = α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
  ◃ γ = β

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

⟧

⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) ◃ γ = α
   × bincoprod_cocone_inr
       (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) ◃ γ = β)

bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ

  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
bincoprod_cocone_inl (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
◃ γ = α
× bincoprod_cocone_inr (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)

F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧

bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) ◃ γ = α
   × bincoprod_cocone_inr
       (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) ◃ γ = β)
 exact (pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_unique α β).

C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
φ ==> ψ
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
bincoprod_cocone_inl (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
◃ ?pr1 = α
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
(λ _ : bincoprod_cocone_inl
         (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) ◃ ?pr1 = α,
 bincoprod_cocone_inr (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
 ◃ ?pr1 = β) ?pr10

        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
φ ==> ψ
 exact (pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans α β).
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
bincoprod_cocone_inl (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
◃ pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans α β = α
 exact (pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_inl α β).
        
C₁, C₂, Z: ∁
F: ∁ ⟦ Z, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₁:= inl_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₁, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
ι₂:= inr_functor (pr1 C₁) (pr1 C₂): ∁ ⟦ C₂, pr1 (bincoprod_of ∁ C₁ C₂) ⟧
κ₁:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₁ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₁ F, Z
⟧
κ₂:= iso_comma_pr2 ι₂ F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ univalent_iso_comma ι₂ F, Z
⟧
W: ∁
φ, ψ: ∁ ⟦ make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂, W ⟧
α: bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inl
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
β: bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · φ ==>
bincoprod_cocone_inr
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂) · ψ
(λ _ : bincoprod_cocone_inl
         (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
       ◃ pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans α β = α,
 bincoprod_cocone_inr (make_bincoprod_cocone Z κ₁ κ₂)
 ◃ pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans α β = β)
  (pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_inl α β)
 exact (pb_of_sum_cats_nat_trans_inr α β).
  Defined.
End UniversalCoproducts.


is_extensive

    (pr1

          C₁ C₂))

 apply has_pb_bicat_of_univ_cats.
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod
bicat_with_pb_is_universal_coproduct
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (pr1
        (bincoprod_of

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod
Z: bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod,,
has_pb_bicat_of_univ_cats
F: (bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod,,
 has_pb_bicat_of_univ_cats) ⟦ Z,
pr1
  (bincoprod_of
     bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod
     C₁ C₂) ⟧
has_bincoprod_ump
  (make_bincoprod_cocone Z
     (pb_pr2
        (bincoprod_cocone_inl
           (pr1
              (bincoprod_of
                 bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod
                 C₁ C₂))) F)
     (pb_pr2
        (bincoprod_cocone_inr
           (pr1
              (bincoprod_of
                 bicat_of_univ_cats_with_biinitial_bincoprod
                 C₁ C₂))) F))

      exact (universal_bicat_of_univ_cats F).
Defined.

(**
 4. Kleisli objects
 *)
Section KleisliCategoryUMP.
  Context (m : mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)).

  Let C : univalent_category := ob_of_mnd m.
  Let M : Monad C := mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m).

  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
kleisli_cocone m

  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
kleisli_cocone m

    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
bicat_of_univ_cats
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, ?x ⟧
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
endo_of_mnd m · ?f ==> ?f
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
(unit_of_mnd m ▹ ?f) • ?γ = lunitor ?f
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
(rassociator (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m) ?f
 • (endo_of_mnd m ◃ ?γ)) • ?γ =
(mult_of_mnd m ▹ ?f) • ?γ

    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
bicat_of_univ_cats
 exact (univalent_kleisli_cat M).
    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m,
univalent_kleisli_cat M ⟧
 exact (kleisli_incl M).
    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
endo_of_mnd m · kleisli_incl M ==> kleisli_incl M
 exact (kleisli_nat_trans M).
    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
(unit_of_mnd m ▹ kleisli_incl M) • kleisli_nat_trans M =
lunitor (kleisli_incl M)
 abstract
        (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro x ;
         use eq_mor_kleisli_cat ;
         exact (@Monad_law2 _ M x)).
    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
(rassociator (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
   (kleisli_incl M)
 • (endo_of_mnd m ◃ kleisli_nat_trans M))
• kleisli_nat_trans M =
(mult_of_mnd m ▹ kleisli_incl M) • kleisli_nat_trans M
 abstract
        (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro x ;
         use eq_mor_kleisli_cat ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite id_left ;
         apply (!(@Monad_law3 _ M x))).
  Defined.

  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
has_kleisli_ump_1 m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone

  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
has_kleisli_ump_1 m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone

    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
kleisli_cocone_mor m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone q

    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
kleisli_cocone_mor m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone q

    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
kleisli_cocone_mor m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone q

    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
p₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_unit m q): ∏ x : ob_of_mnd m,
((unit_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
kleisli_cocone_mor m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone q

 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =

∏ x : C,
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x = # (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x

m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
p₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_unit m q): ∏ x : ob_of_mnd m,
((unit_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
x: C
p₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_mult m q) x: ((rassociator (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
  • (endo_of_mnd m ◃ cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q))
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
((mult_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x = # (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x

      
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
p₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_unit m q): ∏ x : ob_of_mnd m,
((unit_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
x: C
p₂:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_mult m q) x: id₁
  (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
     (endo_of_mnd m (endo_of_mnd m x)))
· pr1 (cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
    (pr1 (endo_of_mnd m) x)
· cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q x =
# (pr1 (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q))
  (pr1 (mult_of_mnd m) x)
· cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q x
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x = # (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x

 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
x: C
p₂: pr1 (cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
  (pr1 (endo_of_mnd m) x)
· cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q x =
# (pr1 (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q))
  (pr1 (mult_of_mnd m) x)
· cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q x
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x = # (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x

      exact p₂.

q: kleisli_cocone m

 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =

# (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x

      bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone ▹ ?f))
• ?α

is_invertible_2cell ?α

M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧

 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
