pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x =
# (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x
bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone, q ⟧
 exact (functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat M F γ p₁ p₂).
    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
p₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_unit m q): ∏ x : ob_of_mnd m,
((unit_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
p₂: ∏ x : C,
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x =
# (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone
· functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat M F γ p₁ p₂ ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
 exact (functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans M F γ p₁ p₂).
    
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
p₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_unit m q): ∏ x : ob_of_mnd m,
((unit_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
p₂: ∏ x : C,
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x =
# (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x
(endo_of_mnd m
 ◃ functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans M F γ
     p₁ p₂) • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q =
(lassociator (endo_of_mnd m)
   (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m
      bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone)
   (functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat M F γ p₁ p₂)
 • (cell_of_kleisli_cocone m
      bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone
    ▹ functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat M F γ p₁ p₂))
• functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans M F γ
    p₁ p₂
 abstract
        (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro x ;
         refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, z · _) (!(id_left _))) ;
         exact (functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_eq M F γ p₁ p₂ x)).

C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
q: kleisli_cocone m
F:= mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ ob_of_mnd m, q ⟧
γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
p₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_unit m q): ∏ x : ob_of_mnd m,
((unit_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
p₂: ∏ x : C,
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x =
# (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x
is_invertible_2cell
  (functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans M F γ
     p₁ p₂)

q: kleisli_cocone m

γ:= cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q: endo_of_mnd m · mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q
p₁:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (kleisli_cocone_unit m q): ∏ x : ob_of_mnd m,
((unit_of_mnd m ▹ mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q)
 • cell_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x =
lunitor (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m q) x
p₂: ∏ x : C,
pr1 γ (M x) · pr1 γ x =
# (pr1 F) (μ M x) · pr1 γ x
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans M F
        γ p₁ p₂))

      exact (functor_from_univalent_kleisli_cat_nat_trans_is_z_iso M F γ p₁ p₂).
  Defined.

M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C

m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
C:= ob_of_mnd m: univalent_category
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad (mnd_op1_to_mnd m): Monad C
C': bicat_of_univ_cats
G₁, G₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone, C' ⟧
α: mor_of_kleisli_cocone m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone · G₁ ==>
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone · G₂
p: (lassociator (endo_of_mnd m)
   (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m
      bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone) G₁
 • (cell_of_kleisli_cocone m
      bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone ▹ G₁))
• α =
((endo_of_mnd m ◃ α)
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd m)
     (mor_of_kleisli_cocone m
        bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone) G₂)
• (cell_of_kleisli_cocone m
     bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone ▹ G₂)
∃! β : G₁ ==> G₂,
mor_of_kleisli_cocone m
  bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone ◃ β = α

has_kleisli bicat_of_univ_cats


has_kleisli bicat_of_univ_cats

  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
∑ k : kleisli_cocone m, has_kleisli_ump m k

  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
kleisli_cocone m
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
has_kleisli_ump_1 m ?pr1
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
(λ _ : has_kleisli_ump_1 m ?pr1,
 has_kleisli_ump_2 m ?pr1) ?pr10

  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
kleisli_cocone m
 exact (bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone m).
  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
has_kleisli_ump_1 m
  (bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone m)
 exact (bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_ump_1 m).
  
m: mnd (op1_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats)
(λ _ : has_kleisli_ump_1 m
         (bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone m),
 has_kleisli_ump_2 m
   (bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_cocone m))
  (bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_ump_1 m)
 exact (bicat_of_univ_cats_has_kleisli_ump_2 m).
Defined.
